name: Chocolate Cheesecake Bars
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 20 Minutes
Bake Time: 30 Minutes
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. To make the crust, combine graham cracker crumbs and brown sugar in a bowl. Stir in melted butter flavor Crisco until well mixed. Press into an ungreased 8 x 8 x 2 pan. Bake for 10 minutes.
3. For the filling, beat cream cheese on medium speed until smooth. Add sugar, cocoa, eggs, and vanilla one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Pour over the baked crust. Return to oven and bake for 30 minutes.
4. To make the topping, beat butter flavor Crisco and cream cheese on medium speed until blended. Stir in confectioners sugar and vanilla. Spread over cooled cheesecake surface. Cut into bars (about 2 x 1 1/2 inches). Refrigerate.
Makes 20 bars.
